seedsower.d: When this Pokemon is hit by an attack, the effect of Grassy Terrain begins.

serenegrace.d: This Pokemon's moves have their secondary effect chance doubled.

shadowshield.d: If this Pokemon is at full HP, damage taken from attacks is halved.

shadowtag.d: Prevents foes from choosing to switch unless they also have this Ability.

sharpness.d: This Pokemon's slicing moves have their power multiplied by 1.5.

shedskin.d: This Pokemon has a 33% chance to have its status cured at the end of each turn.

sheerforce.d: This Pokemon's attacks with secondary effects have 1.3x power; nullifies the effects.

shellarmor.d: This Pokemon cannot be struck by a critical hit.

shielddust.d: This Pokemon is not affected by the secondary effect of another Pokemon's attack.

shieldsdown.d: If Minior, switch-in/end of turn it changes to Core at 1/2 max HP or less, else Meteor.

simple.d: When one of this Pokemon's stat stages is raised or lowered, the amount is doubled.

skilllink.d: This Pokemon's multi-hit attacks always hit the maximum number of times.

slowstart.d: On switch-in, this Pokemon's Attack and Speed are halved for 5 turns.

slushrush.d: If Snow is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled.

sniper.d: If this Pokemon strikes with a critical hit, the damage is multiplied by 1.5.

snowcloak.d: If Snow is active, this Pokemon's evasiveness is 1.25x.

snowwarning.d: On switch-in, this Pokemon summons Snow.

solarpower.d: If Sunny Day is active, this Pokemon's Sp. Atk is 1.5x; loses 1/8 max HP per turn.

solidrock.d: This Pokemon receives 3/4 damage from supereffective attacks.

soulheart.d: This Pokemon's Special Attack is raised by 1 stage when another Pokemon faints.

soundproof.d: This Pokemon is immune to sound-based moves, unless it used the move.

speedboost.d: This Pokemon's Speed is raised 1 stage at the end of each full turn on the field.

spicyspray.d: If this Pokemon is hit by an attack, the attacker becomes burned.

stakeout.d: This Pokemon's offensive stat is doubled against a target that switched in this turn.

stall.d: This Pokemon moves last among Pokemon using the same or greater priority moves.

stalwart.d: This Pokemon's moves cannot be redirected to a different target by any effect.

stamina.d: This Pokemon's Defense is raised by 1 stage after it is damaged by a move.

stancechange.d: If Aegislash, changes Forme to Blade before attacks and Shield before King's Shield.

static.d: 30% chance a Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon will be paralyzed.

steadfast.d: If this Pokemon flinches, its Speed is raised by 1 stage.

steamengine.d: This Pokemon's Speed is raised by 6 stages after it is damaged by Fire/Water moves.

steelworker.d: This Pokemon's offensive stat is multiplied by 1.5 while using a Steel-type attack.

steelyspirit.d: This Pokemon and its allies' Steel-type moves have their power multiplied by 1.5.

stench.d: This Pokemon's attacks without a chance to flinch gain a 10% chance to flinch.

stickyhold.d: This Pokemon cannot lose its held item due to another Pokemon's Ability or attack.

stormdrain.d: This Pokemon draws Water moves to itself to raise Sp. Atk by 1; Water immunity.

strongjaw.d: This Pokemon's bite-based attacks have 1.5x power. Bug Bite is not boosted.

sturdy.d: If this Pokemon is at full HP, it survives one hit with at least 1 HP. Immune to OHKO.

suctioncups.d: This Pokemon cannot be forced to switch out by another Pokemon's attack or item.

superluck.d: This Pokemon's critical hit ratio is raised by 1 stage.

supersweetsyrup.d: On switch-in, this Pokemon lowers the evasiveness of opponents 1 stage. Once per battle.

supremeoverlord.d: This Pokemon's moves have 10% more power for each fainted ally, up to 5 allies.

surgesurfer.d: If Electric Terrain is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled.

swarm.d: At 1/3 or less of its max HP, this Pokemon's offensive stat is 1.5x with Bug attacks.

sweetveil.d: This Pokemon and its allies cannot fall asleep; those already asleep do not wake up.

swiftswim.d: If Rain Dance is active, this Pokemon's Speed is doubled.

swordofruin.d: Active Pokemon without this Ability have their Defense multiplied by 0.75.

symbiosis.d: If an ally uses its item, this Pokemon gives its item to that ally immediately.

synchronize.d: If another Pokemon burns/poisons/paralyzes this Pokemon, it also gets that status.

tabletsofruin.d: Active Pokemon without this Ability have their Attack multiplied by 0.75.

tangledfeet.d: This Pokemon's evasiveness is doubled as long as it is confused.

tanglinghair.d: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Speed lowered by 1 stage.

technician.d: This Pokemon's moves of 60 power or less have 1.5x power, including Struggle.

telepathy.d: This Pokemon does not take damage from attacks made by its allies.

teraformzero.d: Terapagos: Terastallizing ends the effects of weather and terrain. Once per battle.

terashell.d: Terapagos: If full HP, attacks taken have 0.5x effectiveness unless naturally immune.

terashift.d: If this Pokemon is a Terapagos, it transforms into its Terastal Form on entry.

teravolt.d: This Pokemon's moves and their effects ignore the Abilities of other Pokemon.

thermalexchange.d: This Pokemon's Attack is raised by 1 when damaged by Fire moves; can't be burned.

thickfat.d: Fire-/Ice-type moves against this Pokemon deal damage with a halved offensive stat.

tintedlens.d: This Pokemon's attacks that are not very effective on a target deal double damage.

torrent.d: At 1/3 or less of its max HP, this Pokemon's offensive stat is 1.5x with Water attacks.

toughclaws.d: This Pokemon's contact moves have their power multiplied by 1.3.

toxicboost.d: While this Pokemon is poisoned, its physical attacks have 1.5x power.

toxicchain.d: This Pokemon's attacks have a 30% chance of badly poisoning.

toxicdebris.d: If this Pokemon is hit by a physical attack, Toxic Spikes are set on the opposing side.

trace.d: On switch-in, or when it can, this Pokemon copies a random adjacent foe's Ability.

transistor.d: This Pokemon's offensive stat is multiplied by 1.3 while using an Electric-type attack.

triage.d: This Pokemon's healing moves have their priority increased by 3.

truant.d: This Pokemon skips every other turn instead of using a move.

turboblaze.d: This Pokemon's moves and their effects ignore the Abilities of other Pokemon.

unaware.d: This Pokemon ignores other Pokemon's stat stages when taking or doing damage.

unburden.d: Speed is doubled on held item loss; boost is lost if it switches, gets new item/Ability.

unnerve.d: While this Pokemon is active, it prevents opposing Pokemon from using their Berries.

unseenfist.d: This Pokemon's contact moves ignore the target's protection, except Max Guard.

vesselofruin.d: Active Pokemon without this Ability have their Special Attack multiplied by 0.75.

victorystar.d: This Pokemon and its allies' moves have their accuracy multiplied by 1.1.

vitalspirit.d: This Pokemon cannot fall asleep. Gaining this Ability while asleep cures it.

voltabsorb.d: This Pokemon heals 1/4 of its max HP when hit by Electric moves; Electric immunity.

wanderingspirit.d: Pokemon making contact with this Pokemon have their Ability swapped with this one.

waterabsorb.d: This Pokemon heals 1/4 of its max HP when hit by Water moves; Water immunity.

waterbubble.d: This Pokemon's Water power is 2x; it can't be burned; Fire power against it is halved.

watercompaction.d: This Pokemon's Defense is raised 2 stages after it is damaged by a Water-type move.

waterveil.d: This Pokemon cannot be burned. Gaining this Ability while burned cures it.

weakarmor.d: If a physical attack hits this Pokemon, Defense is lowered by 1, Speed is raised by 2.

wellbakedbody.d: This Pokemon's Defense is raised 2 stages if hit by a Fire move; Fire immunity.

whitesmoke.d: Prevents other Pokemon from lowering this Pokemon's stat stages.

wimpout.d: This Pokemon switches out when it reaches 1/2 or less of its maximum HP.

windpower.d: This Pokemon gains the Charge effect when hit by a wind move or Tailwind begins.

windrider.d: Attack raised by 1 if hit by a wind move or Tailwind begins. Wind move immunity.

wonderguard.d: This Pokemon can only be damaged by supereffective moves and indirect damage.

wonderskin.d: Status moves with accuracy checks are 50% accurate when used on this Pokemon.

zenmode.d: If Darmanitan, at end of turn changes Mode to Standard if > 1/2 max HP, else Zen.

zerotohero.d: If this Pokemon is a Palafin in Zero Form, switching out has it change to Hero Form.

mountaineer.d: On switch-in, this Pokemon avoids all Rock-type attacks and Stealth Rock.

rebound.d: On switch-in, blocks certain status moves and bounces them back to the user.

persistent.d: When used, Gravity/Heal Block/Safeguard/Tailwind/Room effects last 2 more turns.
